en_title: Grand Theft Auto 6 'Plays Best on PS5,' Sony Boasts — Here's Why
cn_title: 《侠盗猎车手》索尼称《GTA6》在PS5上表现最佳，并解释原因
subtitle: PS5最佳体验
opus_summary: 索尼在PlayStation博客发文，称《GTA6》利用PS5 DualSense触觉反馈和扬声器、Tempest 3D音频和高速SSD，实现沉浸式体验与近乎瞬时加载。游戏无PS4版，提醒玩家升级。

paragraphs.en: Grand Theft Auto 6 will "play best on PS5" as it makes use of various immersive console features, Sony has said, boasting of its "close partnership" with Rockstar Games.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼表示，《GTA6》将「在PS5上表现最佳」，因为它利用了多种沉浸式主机功能，并夸耀与Rockstar Games的「紧密合作」。

paragraphs.en: In a post on the PlayStation blog , Sony highlighted how GTA 6 will take advantage of the PS5 DualSense controller's haptic feedback and integrated speaker.
paragraphs.cn: 在PlayStation博客上的一篇文章中，索尼强调了《GTA6》将如何利用PS5 DualSense手柄的触觉反馈和内置扬声器。

paragraphs.en: Exactly how much this will differ from the vibrations also available on the Xbox Series X/S controller remains to be seen, though anyone playing on Microsoft's machine will apparently miss out on "sound effects from the controller" that will emerge at various points.
paragraphs.cn: 这与XBOX Series手柄上也有的震动有多大区别还有待观察，不过在微软主机上玩的人显然会错过「来自手柄的音效」，这些音效会在不同时刻出现。

paragraphs.en: Sony also highlighted its Tempest 3D AudioTech, that will allow you to "surround yourself in the distinct soundscapes of Leonida" through its "highly accurate audio positioning." The game will also "leverage the PS5's ultra-high speed SSD" to experience GTA 6 "with near-instant load times." Again, how this will differ from the Xbox version remains unclear.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼还强调了其Tempest 3D AudioTech技术，通过其「高精准音频定位」，让你「沉浸在Leonida独特的声景中」。游戏还将「利用PS5的超高速SSD」来体验《GTA6》的「近乎瞬时的加载时间」。再次说明，这与XBOX版本有何不同仍不清楚。

paragraphs.en: What is clear is that Sony's marketing machine is clearly synced up with Rockstar's — and, notably, there's no similar blog post yet to emerge on the Xbox Wire. ]
paragraphs.cn: 显然，索尼的营销机器与Rockstar的步调一致——而且值得注意的是，XBOX Wire上还没有出现类似的博客文章。

paragraphs.en: As Sony itself goes on to note, the launch of GTA 5 is your best reason yet to buy a PS5 (this side of the console's price rises), as there is no PS4 version of the game. It's a similar message to the one Sony recently began sending its own customers — warning them that they won't be able to play GTA 6 on older hardware, and that it really now is time to upgrade. Rockstar also recently eased the console transition itself, by promising free upgrades to GTA 5 on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S for those with a PS4 or Xbox One copy .
paragraphs.cn: 索尼自己继续指出，《GTA5》的发布是你购买PS5的最佳理由（在主机价格上涨的情况下），因为该游戏没有PS4版本。这与索尼最近开始向其客户传递的信息类似——警告他们《GTA6》将无法在旧硬件上运行，现在真的是时候升级了。Rockstar最近也通过承诺为持有PS4或XBOX One版《GTA5》的玩家免费升级到PS5和XBOX Series版本来缓解主机过渡。

paragraphs.en: Need to catch up on all of today's GTA 6 news? Rockstar has now announced GTA 6's price and also a pricier $100 Ultimate Edition , released 63 new GTA 6 screenshots , and confirmed that physical editions of the game won't include a disc in the box .
paragraphs.cn: 需要补上今天所有《GTA6》新闻吗？Rockstar现已公布《GTA6》售价，以及定价100美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版，同时发布了63张全新《GTA6》截图，并确认游戏实体版盒内不含光盘。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
